88 = Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns
363 GG0170N2_4_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170N2_4_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170N2 Discharge Goal 4 Steps Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal ability to go up and down four steps with or without a rail. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal ability to go up and down four steps with or without a rail. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal
